headline: How CMS Energy’s New CFO Team and Leadership Shuffle (CMS) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Earlier this week, CMS Energy announced that Sri Maddipati will become Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, while Chris Fultz will assume the role of senior vice president and president of electric supply, as longtime CFO Rejji Hayes retires. The reshuffle elevates leaders with both operational and financial expertise, concentrating oversight of investor relations, capital planning and the electric supply business in a closely connected management team. We’ll now look at how...
